TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: o maan ko pakerang ? ira ko mahanay a sowal PaPakayni to na pakerang hananay ma tamaay to ko sowar ni Ming LiLin mipaka lafi to matayaray saka ccay Mapaherekay to ko demak anini (matayar to to tayra no tireng ano dafak sanay) Saka tosa Mi ahowiday to tayniay mipadang a matayaray Saka tolo Patara a'ayawen ko palo noya raroma'an hay mahapinang no tayniay a salawinawina ato widang. O papi hapinangay to wawa nona raroma'an to, tayniay aca a ngasaw ato widang. Salikoray to i Iraay ko sapaka olah to matayaray, ano tosa polo' aca manca Lima polo'aca ko haca ira mahamekay milayap koya matayaray ma^min. Nawhan todongay opi "haiay" to tayar ira konian. O sapi ara to sapi pakerang ma^min haw i , O kasasolutan no 'alomanay kiya, Pakayni mahapinang ko pinangan no pangcah/'Amis hananay, O Mafana'ay mihilateng hali padamaay ato hali adayayay a finacadan. kayni to na pakerang hananay ma tamaay to ko sowar ni Ming LiLin mipaka lafi to matayaray
S.PHON: o~u maan ko~u pak…ôraŇč ? ira ko~u mańßanaj a so~uwa…ĺ papakajni to~u na pak…ôraŇč ńßananaj ma tamaaj to~u ko~u so~uwar ni miŇč …ĺi…ĺin mipaka …ĺafi to~u matajaraj saka ¶ ¶aj mapańß…ôr…ôkaj to~u ko~u …¨~…ģ…ômak anini (matajar to~u to~u tajra no~u tir…ôŇč ano~u …¨~…ģafak sanaj) saka to~usa mi ańßo~uwi…¨~…ģaj to~u tajniaj mipa…¨~…ģaŇč a matajaraj saka to~u…ĺo~u patara a °ajaw…ôn ko~u pa…ĺo~u no~uja raro~uma °an ńßaj mańßapinaŇč no~u tajniaj a sa…ĺawinawina ato~u wi…¨~…ģaŇč. o~u papi ńßapinaŇčaj to~u wawa no~una raro~uma °an to~u, tajniaj a ¶a a Ňčasaw ato~u wi…¨~…ģaŇč. sa…ĺiko~uraj to~u i iraaj ko~u sapaka o~u…ĺańß to~u matajaraj, ano~u to~usa po~u…ĺo~u ° a ¶a man ¶a …ĺima po~u…ĺo~u °a ¶a ko~u ńßa ¶a ira mańßam…ôkaj mi…ĺajap ko~uja matajaraj ma Ēmin. nawńßan to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj o~upi "ńßaiaj" to~u tajar ira ko~unian. o~u sapi ara to~u sapi pak…ôraŇč ma Ēmin ńßaw i , o~u kasaso~u…ĺo~u~utan no~u °a…ĺo~umanaj kija, pakajni mańßapinaŇč ko~u pinaŇčan no~u paŇč ¶ańß/ °amis ńßananaj, o~u mafana °aj mińßi…ĺat…ôŇč ńßa…ĺi pa…¨~…ģamaaj ato~u ńßa…ĺi a…¨~…ģajajaj a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan. kajni to~u na pak…ôraŇč ńßananaj ma tamaaj to~u ko~u so~uwar ni miŇč …ĺi…ĺin mipaka …ĺafi to~u matajaraj
S.FORM: o maan ko pakerang ? ira ko mahanay a sowal PaPakayni to na pakerang hananay ma tamaay to ko sowar ni Ming LiLin mipaka lafi to matayaray saka ccay Mapaherekay to ko demak anini (matayar to to tayra no tireng ano dafak sanay) Saka tosa Mi ahowiday to tayniay mipadang a matayaray Saka tolo Patara a'ayawen ko palo noya raroma'an hay mahapinang no tayniay a salawinawina ato widang. O papi hapinangay to wawa nona raroma'an to, tayniay aca a ngasaw ato widang. Salikoray to i Iraay ko sapaka olah to matayaray, ano tosa polo' aca manca Lima polo'aca ko haca ira mahamekay milayap koya matayaray ma^min. Nawhan todongay opi "haiay" to tayar ira konian. O sapi ara to sapi pakerang ma^min haw i , O kasasolutan no 'alomanay kiya, Pakayni mahapinang ko pinangan no pangcah/'Amis hananay, O Mafana'ay mihilateng hali padamaay ato hali adayayay a finacadan. kayni to na pakerang hananay ma tamaay to ko sowar ni Ming LiLin mipaka lafi to matayaray
S.PHON: o~u maan ko~u pak…ôraŇč ? ira ko~u mańßanaj a so~uwa…ĺ papakajni to~u na pak…ôraŇč ńßananaj ma tamaaj to~u ko~u so~uwar ni miŇč …ĺi…ĺin mipaka …ĺafi to~u matajaraj saka ¶ ¶aj mapańß…ôr…ôkaj to~u ko~u …¨~…ģ…ômak anini (matajar to~u to~u tajra no~u tir…ôŇč ano~u …¨~…ģafak sanaj) saka to~usa mi ańßo~uwi…¨~…ģaj to~u tajniaj mipa…¨~…ģaŇč a matajaraj saka to~u…ĺo~u patara a °ajaw…ôn ko~u pa…ĺo~u no~uja raro~uma °an ńßaj mańßapinaŇč no~u tajniaj a sa…ĺawinawina ato~u wi…¨~…ģaŇč. o~u papi ńßapinaŇčaj to~u wawa no~una raro~uma °an to~u, tajniaj a ¶a a Ňčasaw ato~u wi…¨~…ģaŇč. sa…ĺiko~uraj to~u i iraaj ko~u sapaka o~u…ĺańß to~u matajaraj, ano~u to~usa po~u…ĺo~u ° a ¶a man ¶a …ĺima po~u…ĺo~u °a ¶a ko~u ńßa ¶a ira mańßam…ôkaj mi…ĺajap ko~uja matajaraj ma Ēmin. nawńßan to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj o~upi "ńßaiaj" to~u tajar ira ko~unian. o~u sapi ara to~u sapi pak…ôraŇč ma Ēmin ńßaw i , o~u kasaso~u…ĺo~u~utan no~u °a…ĺo~umanaj kija, pakajni mańßapinaŇč ko~u pinaŇčan no~u paŇč ¶ańß/ °amis ńßananaj, o~u mafana °aj mińßi…ĺat…ôŇč ńßa…ĺi pa…¨~…ģamaaj ato~u ńßa…ĺi a…¨~…ģajajaj a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan. kajni to~u na pak…ôraŇč ńßananaj ma tamaaj to~u ko~u so~uwar ni miŇč …ĺi…ĺin mipaka …ĺafi to~u matajaraj
